overview: A compact Ventilator suitable for Emergency and Disaster Relief Situations, Applications in Ambulances, Public Areas and also for Intra-Hospital and Inter-Hospital Transport

specs.label: 9 ventilation modes
specs.value: IPPV, V-AC, V-SIMV, P-AC, P-SIMV, CPAP, PCV, Manual, CPR.

features: Compact design with weight of 3.4 kg.
7” color touch screen with screen lock function.
Airway pressure and EtCO2 real-time waveforms.
Smart CPR mode according to AHA guideline.
Rechargeable Li-ion battery with 6 hours working time.
Audible and visual alarm for multiple parameters.
